meta.title: About HUGGO — Vision, Partners, Commitments
meta.description: HUGGO, an Atidgo subsidiary, turns WhatsApp into a sales channel for retailers. Vision, tech partners, RSE commitments. Request a demo.

hero.title: HUGGO, the AI assistant that brings retailers closer to their customers.
hero.subtitle: Born from the conviction that WhatsApp is the natural channel for local commerce. Built for retailers who want to take back control of their customer relationships — without complexity, without commission.

vision.title: Why HUGGO exists.
vision.description:
Local commerce feeds neighborhoods, animates villages, and creates connections. But every year, retailers lose ground to platforms that capture their customers and erode their margins.

HUGGO was born from one observation: WhatsApp is already on 95% of French smartphones. Your customers use it 50 times a day. The channel exists — it just needs to become a sales channel.

That's what HUGGO does: a personalized AI assistant for every retailer, capable of taking orders, recommending products, and building loyalty. Directly within a WhatsApp conversation. No app to download, no account to create, no commission to pay.

company.title: Built on solid foundations.
company.description:
HUGGO is a subsidiary of Atidgo, a specialist in conversational technology and AI applied to commerce. This lineage gives HUGGO a proven technical infrastructure, a network of technology partners, and a history of €50M in qualified transactional data.

HUGGO is the entity fully dedicated to local commerce: Atidgo's technology, focused on the needs of retailers and their customers.

items.name: Google Cloud Platform
items.description: Cloud infrastructure and artificial intelligence. HUGGO is built on GCP for scalability, reliability, and AI capabilities.

items.name: Centrale Paris / France
items.description: Academic partnership for the predictive model (weather + local event crossover).

items.name: ACSEO
items.description: Technical integrator. Development partner since the platform's inception.

items.name: Orisha Distribution
items.description: ERP synchronization (products, stock, orders). The interface with existing POS systems.

items.name: Contodeo
items.description: Integrated payment. Multi-method within the WhatsApp conversation.

items.title: Anti-waste
items.description: Pre-orders let the retailer produce to demand. Less surplus, less loss, less waste.

items.title: Digital inclusion
items.description: HUGGO runs on WhatsApp — the most widespread app in France. No learning curve, no account to create. Accessible to elderly people, non-tech-savvy users, and tourists.

items.title: Local commerce
items.description: Every order through HUGGO goes directly to the retailer. No middleman platform, no commission. Revenue stays local.

items.title: Short supply chain
items.description: Through HUGGO Collectivity, local producers sell directly to consumers. From field to table, no detour.

items.title: Quality of life
items.description: Shorter lines for customers. Less operational stress for retailers. Pre-orders smooth activity and reduce rush hours.

items.title: Accessibility
items.description: Order from home, without traveling, without time constraints. For people with reduced mobility, caregivers, and families far from shops.

final-cta.title: Join the retailers transforming their customer relationships.
